prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: MCN-REVIVX-SEAMGRIPTF-BUNDLE-HPNR
Product Type: OUTDOOR_RECREATION_PRODUCT
Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID
Existing Title: GEAR AID Tent Waterproofing Spray Kits for Nylon Tents
Description: Need a simple and effective solution to tent waterproofing Use Revivex Instant Water Repellent, a spray-on formula that immediately creates a protective barrier against water, oil and stains. Pair it with Seam Grip TF or Seam Grip FC to protect your tent from top to bottom. Choose the tent “waterproofer” kit that’s right for you. Ideal for treating small and large family-size tents, Seam Grip FC seals up to 60 linear ft of seams and cures in 2-4 hours. Seam Grip TF fabric sealant also cures within 4 hours and covers up to 85 sq ft of tent floor or rainfly. From tents to boots, our multipurpose water repellent, Revivex Instant works on nylon, leather, GORE-TEX fabric, eVent and other waterproof-breathable materials. With GEAR AID Tent Waterproofing Kits, moisture and discomfort inside tents will be a distant memory.
Search Terms: waterproofing spray tent waterproofing spray fabric waterproofing spray canvas waterproofing spray waterproofing fabric spray fabric waterproofing spray outdoor waterproofing spray for tents tent spray waterproofing waterproofing spray for outerwear
Features:
- Stop leaks in your rainfly, tent seams/floor with a GEAR AID Tent Waterproofing Kit; all kits include Revivex Instant Water Repellent, a breathable, silicone-free formula
- Add repellency to the rainfly, sleeping bags, leather boots, and GORE-TEX jackets with Revivex Instant (5 oz spray can)
- Use the Seam Seal Kit to waterproof a rainfly and seal leaky seams in under 4 hours with a fast-curing sealant, Seam Grip FC; 2 fl oz bottle covers up to 60 ft of seams
- Use the Floor Seal Kit to add water repellency to a rainfly and seal tent floor leaks with a new PU coating, Seam Grip TF; the 4 fl oz bottle covers up to 85 sq ft of fabric
- Packaging may vary

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Tent Waterproofing Spray Kit Bundle

openai.item_name: GEAR AID Tent Waterproofing Spray Kit for Nylon Tents

anthropic.title_differentiation: Revivex Instant Water Repellent, Seam Grip Sealant, Waterproof Nylon Tents, Fast-Curing, Covers Up To 145 Sq Ft

openai.title_differentiation: Instant Water Repellent, Breathable Silicone-Free Formula, Seam Grip TF And FC Options, For Tents And Gear
